title: Electronically contacting the Natural and Non-prescription Health Products Directorate: Overview - Canada.ca
content:
## Electronically contacting the Natural and Non-prescription Health Products Directorate: Overview
- Submitting electronic applications
This document  explains how to interact electronically with the Natural and Non-prescription  Health Products Directorate of Health Canada. A key objective of the Natural  Health Products Online Solution is to provide an end-to-end process for the  directorate and applicants to exchange protected electronic information.
By taking advantage of these electronic  tools, applicants will experience an efficient and secure way of submitting  applications and dealing with the directorate electronically. Benefits include:
- receipt  confirmations and tracking
- reduced  frequency of application errors
- quick  and cost-effective means of communication
- all  correspondence sent in electronic (.pdf) format, resulting in less paper
To use the  electronic forms associated most effectively, be sure that your workstation  meets the System Requirements .
